chapter_title.en: On passing by the corpses of Talha and another rebel, who were killed in the Battle of the Camel

text: ومن كلام له (عليه السلام) لما مر بطلحة بن عبد الله وعبد الرحمن بن عتاب بن أسيد وهما قتيلان يوم الجمل

en.sayed-ali-raza: When Amīr al-mu’minīn passed by the corpses of Ṭalḥah ibn ‘Ubaydullāh and ‘Abd ar-Raḥmān ibn ‘Attāb ibn Asīd who were both killed in the battle of Jamal, he said:
